; Add one page-2 action inside stock DocumentView. It does not replace stock toolbar or gestures.
; Ferrari recovered DocumentView.qml SHA-256: a2102689b1feb4604e98ece588ee4606a64a7b0599bda2a3e8fac431f0fa74a5
VERSION 3.28.0.162
AFFECT [[1224665461898798997]]
    TRAVERSE FocusScope > Item#_uiContainer
        LOCATE AFTER Toolbar#toolbar
        INSERT {
            Item {
                id: lettersHomeStream
                objectName: "letters-home-stream"
                anchors.fill: parent
                z: toolbar.z
                visible: root.document
                    && root.document.visibleName.indexOf("Letters Home ") === 0
                    && root.document.visibleName.indexOf("Letters Home Review ") !== 0
                    && root.currentPage === 0

                property int version: -1
                property bool complete: false
                property var columns: []
                property string sessionKey: visible ? sessionId() : ""
                property int letterFontSize: Math.max(28, Math.round(height * 0.023))
                property int letterColumnGap: Math.max(68, Math.round(width * 0.075))

                onSessionKeyChanged: {
                    version = -1;
                    complete = false;
                    columns = [];
                }

                function sessionId() {
                    let value = root.document.visibleName.substring("Letters Home ".length);
                    if (value.length > 4
                            && value.substring(value.length - 4).toLowerCase() === ".pdf") {
                        value = value.substring(0, value.length - 4);
                    }
                    return value;
                }

                function toColumns(value) {
                    const compact = value.replace(/\s/g, "");
                    const charactersPerColumn = Math.max(
                        18,
                        Math.floor((height * 0.855) / (letterFontSize * 1.45))
                    );
                    const result = [];
                    for (let index = 0; index < compact.length; index += charactersPerColumn) {
                        result.push(compact.substring(index, index + charactersPerColumn));
                    }
                    return result;
                }

                function poll() {
                    if (!visible || complete) {
                        return;
                    }
                    const request = new XMLHttpRequest();
                    request.open("GET", "http://10.11.99.16:8765/v1/sessions/" + sessionKey);
                    request.onreadystatechange = function() {
                        if (request.readyState !== XMLHttpRequest.DONE || request.status !== 200) {
                            return;
                        }
                        const response = JSON.parse(request.responseText);
                        if (response.version !== lettersHomeStream.version) {
                            lettersHomeStream.version = response.version;
                            lettersHomeStream.columns = lettersHomeStream.toColumns(response.text || "");
                        }
                        lettersHomeStream.complete = response.status === "ready"
                            || response.status === "failed";
                    };
                    request.send();
                }

                Timer {
                    interval: 750
                    repeat: true
                    triggeredOnStart: true
                    running: lettersHomeStream.visible && !lettersHomeStream.complete
                    onTriggered: lettersHomeStream.poll()
                }

                Repeater {
                    model: lettersHomeStream.columns
                    Text {
                        x: lettersHomeStream.width - Math.round(lettersHomeStream.width * 0.08)
                            - index * lettersHomeStream.letterColumnGap - implicitWidth / 2
                        y: Math.round(lettersHomeStream.height * 0.07)
                        text: modelData.split("").join("\n")
                        color: "#263d52"
                        font.pixelSize: lettersHomeStream.letterFontSize
                        lineHeight: 1.45
                    }
                }
            }

            ~&16889273474833229381&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: lettersHomeSubmit
                ~&8399878573055752961&~: "letters-home-submit"
                ~&6504315758&~: ~&6504222003&~("Send to Codex")
                ~&233748328658231&~: root.document
                    && root.document.visibleName.indexOf("Letters Home ") === 0
                    && root.document.visibleName.indexOf("Letters Home Review ") !== 0
                    && root.currentPage === 1
                ~&233726547792244&~: ~&6504329801&~
                ~&233721384511543&~.~&214640173127&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&214640173127&~
                ~&233721384511543&~.~&7082507142622&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&7082507142622&~
                ~&233721384511543&~.~&233736391113274&~: 48
                ~&254542236275632405&~: {
                    lettersHomeSubmit.enabled = false;
                    lettersHomeSubmit.text = "Sending to Codex…";
                    let sessionId = root.document.visibleName.substring("Letters Home ".length);
                    if (sessionId.length > 4
                            && sessionId.substring(sessionId.length - 4).toLowerCase() === ".pdf") {
                        sessionId = sessionId.substring(0, sessionId.length - 4);
                    }
                    const request = new XMLHttpRequest();
                    request.open("POST", "http://10.11.99.16:8765/v1/sessions/submit");
                    request.setRequestHeader("Content-Type", "application/json");
                    request.onreadystatechange = function() {
                        if (request.readyState !== XMLHttpRequest.DONE) {
                            return;
                        }
                        if (request.status === 200) {
                            const response = JSON.parse(request.responseText);
                            root.notificationQueue.enqueue({
                                text: "A reply has arrived",
                                timeout: 5000
                            });
                            root.windowNavigator.open("legacydevice/window/main", {
                                documentId: response.document_id,
                                page: response.review_page_index
                            });
                            return;
                        }
                        console.warn("[LettersHome] submit failed", request.status, request.responseText);
                        root.notificationQueue.enqueue({
                            text: "Reply not sent. Your ink is safe; try again.",
                            timeout: 5000
                        });
                        lettersHomeSubmit.text = "Send to Codex";
                        lettersHomeSubmit.enabled = true;
                    };
                    request.send(JSON.stringify({
                        session_id: sessionId,
                        document_id: root.document.id,
                        reply_page_index: root.currentPage,
                        profile_id: "ferrari_3.28.0.162",
                        conversation_context: ""
                    }));
                }
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
